notes.title: Checked-source limitation
notes.body: Checked Eaton FAZ SKU pages explicitly state Ics 7.5kA, while some catalog variants only expose operational switching capacity values.

notes.title: Do not merge standard families
notes.body: FAZ combines IEC/EN 60898-1 and IEC/EN 60947-2 coverage. Keep the variant-level standard split when exact specification comparison matters.
